CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, National Association's petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon is granted. Defendants SF American Taxicab, Inc. and Philip Achilles fail to show that there are any grounds to vacate or correct enumerated in CCP 1286.2 and 1286.6. The only arguments defendants make in opposition relate to the sufficiency of evidence on which the arbitrator relied and the lack of law cited by plaintiff. However, it is well-established that "[t]he merits of the controversy between the parties are not subject to judicial review" and "a court may not review the sufficiency of the evidence supporting an arbitrator's award." (Moncharsh v. Heily & Blase (1992) 3 Cal.4th 1, 11, citations omitted.) Order and a separate judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
